prompt: Create a hyper-realistic cinematic full-body fashion portrait of a stylish fair young Pakistani woman standing in a modern upscale café lounge, shown from head to shoes in a relaxed three-quarter side pose with her hands gently clasped at waist level. Her face is softly anonymized/blurred, and her dark hair is tied back in a neat low ponytail. She wears exactly 7 visible outfit and accessory elements: a blue-green oversized plaid cropped button-up shirt with rolled sleeves, a fitted white inner top, a sheer white dupatta with pale pink edging draped around her shoulders and flowing down her back, high-waisted light-wash wide-leg jeans, clean white low-top sneakers, a gold wristwatch, and small stud earrings. Use ultra-modern 2026 modest streetwear fashion with premium fabric texture and realistic stitching. The setting is a warm beige café interior with large bright windows on the left, soft sofas and seated customers in the background, a curved cream counter on the right, shallow depth of field, golden ambient lighting, and a polished tiled floor. Include exactly 4 blurred background people: one seated woman at the left foreground table, one seated person near the left window, and two seated men near the counter on the right. Shoot like a high-end editorial lifestyle photograph using an 85mm lens, natural window light, creamy bokeh, realistic proportions, detailed denim texture, soft shadows, and a warm cinematic color grade. Avoid text, logos, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted hands, or exaggerated facial features.
